## 🔐 Security Checklist (MANDATORY)

### STRIDE analysis
- [ ] Spoofing considered (authentication/identity risks)
- [ ] Tampering considered (data integrity, mutation risks)
- [ ] Repudiation considered (logging/auditability)
- [ ] Information Disclosure considered (PII/secrets exposure)
- [ ] Denial of Service considered (resource exhaustion)
- [ ] Elevation of Privilege considered

### Risk Assessment
- [ ] This change is **small / low risk**
- [ ] OR → This change is **significant and requires risk assessment**
- [ ] Risk assessment document linked (if applicable)

### General Security
- [ ] No secrets added (keys, tokens, passwords)
- [ ] Dependencies reviewed / updated
- [ ] Input validation and error handling reviewed
